action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 11 trained with augmented data (synthetic 3-6 mutation sequences using additive+pairwise effects). Val Spearman 0.8843 (slightly lower than 0.8866 without augmentation). Previous test Spearman was 0.7432. Analysis: The augmentation should help test generalization even if val doesn't improve (val is also ≤2 mutations). Must submit eval to see if test score improved. Decision: Submit eval immediately to measure impact of augmentation on test extrapolation.
